message:
feat(web): implement SpeedScore Detail Panel with component breakdown

Implements bead remote_compilation_helper-izq - SpeedScore Detail Panel.

Components created:
- SpeedScoreDetailPanel: Main panel with loading, error, empty, partial,
  and full states with expand/collapse animation and keyboard navigation
- ComponentRow: Row component with animated progress bar for each
  benchmark component (CPU, Memory, Disk, Network, Compilation)
- ComponentBreakdown: Container showing all component scores with
  weights (30%, 15%, 20%, 15%, 20%) and contributions
- Tooltip: Simple tooltip UI component for info icons

Types added:
- PartialSpeedScore: For benchmarks that failed mid-way
- BenchmarkResults: Raw benchmark metrics per component

Tests:
- Added 43 unit tests covering all states and interactions
- All tests pass with vitest and @testing-library/react

Also fixed pre-existing Rust test compilation errors:
- Added missing speedscore field to WorkerInfo test fixtures
- Fixed WorkersAction::List pattern match in CLI test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
